query:
SELECT 
  mi.id as item_id,
  mi.name as item_name,
  cg.id as group_id,
  cg.name as group_name,
  cg.is_required,
  cg.min_selections,
  cg.max_selections,
  co.id as option_id,
  co.name as option_name,
  co.price_extra as option_price
FROM menu_items mi
JOIN menu_addon_groups cg ON cg.menu_item_id = mi.id
JOIN menu_addon_options co ON co.group_id = cg.id
WHERE mi.name LIKE '%Marmitex%' OR mi.name LIKE '%marmitex%'
ORDER BY mi.name, cg.display_order, co.display_order;
